values.description: ALB DNS name from Terraform output alb_dns_name. Format: http://parseon-dev-alb-<id>.us-east-1.elb.amazonaws.com
CloudFront domain from Terraform output cloudfront_domain. Used for frontend smoke tests.
Username for the smoke test user. Must exist in the deployed database.
Password for the smoke test user. Set as a secret — do not commit a real value here.
Relative path to the test PDF used in upload requests. Resolved relative to this environment file.
